case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) VS. JOSE DEJESUS ARRIAGA RIVERA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP)
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE RE: SC-100 PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE DE JESUS ARRIAGA RIVERA. FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $65.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, JOSE DEJESUS ARRIAGA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, JOSE DEJESUS ARRIAGA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/1/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
